notes: Fortunes (slice 1): temporary boons & banes you pick up by exploring new worlds, research breakthroughs, and plain luck. Boons like +1 action, +20% weapon damage, trade winds (cheaper buys/dearer sales), research sparks, political capital, clean burn (−fuel) and a feared name (+raid take); banes like reactor leaks, customs crackdowns, ion storms and saboteurs. Stronger effects are briefer (1–20 cycles); banes always wear off and many can be cleared at a port for credits. Active Fortunes show under your Ship stats. The pool shifts by game phase. Next slice: hunt faint signals you Investigate for a roll.
